svg.title: Blank APC40 mkII control-surface template
svg.desc: A label-free white vector template with black outlines for every top-panel control.

g.text: APC40 mkII — native MIDI addresses (decoded from React v4.4 preset)
Grid: note = (row_from_bottom)x8 + (col-1). Per-track buttons: note = button type, MIDI channel = track (1-8). Knobs/faders = CC.
